frpm.CDSCode: Unique 14-character identifier for educational institutions in California.
frpm.Academic Year: Represents the specific academic year for the data, formatted as YYYY-YYYY.
frpm.County Code: Two-character numeric code identifying each county in California.
frpm.District Code: Five-digit numeric identifier for school districts within California.
frpm.School Code: Seven-digit numeric code uniquely identifying each school in the database.
frpm.County Name: Name of the county associated with the educational data.
frpm.District Name: Official name of the school district represented in the dataset.
frpm.School Name: Name of the individual school, providing context for educational data.
frpm.District Type: Categorizes the type of school district, indicating its governance structure.
frpm.School Type: Classifies the nature of the school, such as public or alternative education.
frpm.Educational Option Type: Categorizes the type of educational institution available to students.
frpm.NSLP Provision Status: Indicates the level of National School Lunch Program provisions for the school.
frpm.Charter School: Identifies whether the institution operates as a charter school or not.
frpm.Charter School Number: Unique identifier for each charter school, aiding in data tracking and management.
frpm.Charter Funding Type: Describes the funding model under which the charter school operates.
frpm.IRC: Indicates whether the school is part of the Interdistrict Transfer Program.
frpm.Low Grade: Specifies the lowest grade level offered at the educational institution.
frpm.High Grade: Specifies the highest grade level offered at the educational institution.
frpm.Enrollment (K-12): Represents the total number of students enrolled in K-12 grades.
frpm.Free Meal Count (K-12): Counts the number of K-12 students receiving free meals.
frpm.Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) (REAL): Proportion of K-12 students eligible for free meals, expressed as a decimal.
frpm.FRPM Count (K-12) (REAL): Total number of K-12 students receiving free or reduced-price meals.
frpm.Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12) (REAL): Percentage of K-12 students eligible for free or reduced-price meals.
frpm.Enrollment (Ages 5-17) (REAL): Total number of students aged 5 to 17 enrolled in schools.
frpm.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) (REAL): Count of students aged 5 to 17 receiving free meals.
frpm.Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17) (R: Proportion of students aged 5 to 17 eligible for free meals.
frpm.FRPM Count (Ages 5-17) (REAL): Total number of students aged 5 to 17 receiving free or reduced-price meals.
frpm.Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17) (R: Percentage of students aged 5 to 17 eligible for free or reduced-price meals.
frpm.2013-14 CALPADS Fall 1 Certification Sta: Indicates the certification status of CALPADS for the 2013-14 school year.

satscores.cds: Unique identifier for each school or district, formatted as a numeric string.
satscores.rtype: Indicates the type of record, either 'D' for district or 'S' for school.
satscores.sname: Name of the school, with many entries having null values.
satscores.dname: Name of the school district, uniquely identifying each district.
satscores.cname: Name of the county where the school or district is located.
satscores.enroll12: Total number of students enrolled in the 12th grade at the school.
satscores.NumTstTakr: Count of students who took standardized tests at the school.
satscores.AvgScrRead: Average reading score of students, with some entries missing.
satscores.AvgScrMath: Average math score of students, with some entries missing.
satscores.AvgScrWrite: Average writing score of students, with some entries missing.
satscores.NumGE1500: Counts the number of SAT scores equal to or exceeding 1500.

schools.CDSCode: Unique 14-character identifier for each school in the database.
schools.NCESDist: 7-character code representing the school district assigned by NCES.
schools.NCESSchool: 5-character identifier for individual schools within a district.
schools.StatusType: Current operational status of the school, indicating its activity level.
schools.County: Name of the county where the school is located.
schools.District: Name of the school district managing the school.
schools.School: Official name of the school, identifying its educational institution.
schools.Street: Full street address of the school, providing location details.
schools.StreetAbr: Abbreviated street address of the school for concise representation.
schools.City: City name where the school is situated, indicating its geographical location.
schools.Zip: Represents the postal code for school locations, aiding in geographic identification.
schools.State: Indicates the state code, consistently formatted as a two-character identifier.
schools.MailStreet: Contains the full street address for school mail delivery, enhancing communication accuracy.
schools.MailStrAbr: Provides an abbreviated version of the street address for concise mailing purposes.
schools.MailCity: Specifies the city name for the school's mailing address, facilitating location identification.
schools.MailZip: Denotes the postal code for mail delivery, ensuring accurate correspondence.
schools.MailState: Represents the state code for mailing purposes, consistently formatted as a two-character identifier.
schools.Phone: Lists the contact phone number for the school, essential for communication.
schools.Ext: Indicates the phone extension for direct contact within the school, enhancing communication efficiency.
schools.Website: Provides the school's web address, serving as a digital communication platform.
schools.OpenDate: Indicates the date a school was established, reflecting its historical significance.
schools.ClosedDate: Represents the date a school ceased operations, indicating its operational lifespan.
schools.Charter: Denotes whether a school is a charter institution, impacting governance and funding.
schools.CharterNum: Unique identifier for charter schools, aiding in tracking and classification.
schools.FundingType: Describes the financial support model of the school, influencing resource availability.
schools.DOC: Code representing the district of classification, essential for administrative categorization.
schools.DOCType: Specifies the type of educational district, providing context for governance structure.
schools.SOC: Code indicating the school operational category, useful for statistical analysis.
schools.SOCType: Describes the specific type of school, aiding in educational program classification.
schools.EdOpsCode: Operational code for educational programs, facilitating program identification and management.
schools.EdOpsName: Categorizes schools by operational type, indicating educational focus and structure.
schools.EILCode: Represents educational institution levels, aiding in understanding school classifications.
schools.EILName: Describes the educational level of schools, providing clarity on grade offerings.
schools.GSoffered: Indicates the range of grades offered, reflecting the school's educational scope.
schools.GSserved: Shows the range of grades served, highlighting the student population served.
schools.Virtual: Denotes the school's virtual status, indicating online or in-person learning options.
schools.Magnet: Indicates whether the school is a magnet institution, highlighting specialized programs.
schools.Latitude: Provides geographic location of the school, essential for mapping and analysis.
schools.Longitude: Complements latitude for precise geographic positioning of the school.
schools.AdmFName1: Records the first names of school administrators, personalizing school leadership data.
schools.AdmLName1: Primary last names of school administrators, indicating diverse representation across schools.
schools.AdmEmail1: Main email addresses for school administrators, facilitating communication and outreach.
schools.AdmFName2: Secondary first names of administrators, providing additional identification for school staff.
schools.AdmLName2: Secondary last names of administrators, enhancing the identification of school personnel.
schools.AdmEmail2: Alternative email addresses for administrators, ensuring multiple contact options for communication.
schools.AdmFName3: Tertiary first names of administrators, offering further identification for school staff members.
schools.AdmLName3: Tertiary last names of administrators, contributing to a comprehensive staff identification system.
schools.AdmEmail3: Additional email addresses for administrators, supporting effective communication within the school system.
schools.LastUpdate: Records the last update date, ensuring data currency and accuracy for school information.
